warnings: This is the first of 2 mechanical sheets in the drawing set (M-01 of 2) -- together with M-02 (page 66) it covers this 2-story house's full ventilation-fan / AC layout, split by floor the same way the electrical lighting/outlet plans are split (EE-03/04, EE-05/06). Note: unlike house #3's M-01/M-02, this sheet title only mentions 'พัดลมระบายอากาศ' (ventilation fans), not air conditioners -- confirm on M-02 whether AC units appear only on that sheet.
GRID: dimension chain matches the ground-floor electrical sheets and the master grid file exactly.
Small stair-tread numbers ('6 5 4 3 2 1') printed near the 'ขึ้น' arrow at the staircase are structural/architectural (tread count), not a mechanical element -- excluded from 'elements'.

This ground floor only has 2 ventilation devices total (1 kitchen propeller fan + 1 bathroom ceiling-fan/grille pair) -- no AC units are shown here, consistent with a small ground floor with no bedrooms.

Room labeling on this sheet ('ทางเดิน' for the carport walkway area, distinct from 'จอดรถ' further down) differs slightly from EE-03/EE-05's simpler 'จอดรถ' label for the same general area -- both sheets appear to be describing the same carport/walkway space, just with different label granularity; not treated as a discrepancy.
